name: Three Meals a Day: Mountain Village
overview:
The famous series of 'three meals a day' came back with a new crew and a beautiful scenery of mountains.

Three celebrities - Yum Jung-ah, Yoon Se-a, and Park So-dam - have to follow to rules of the program, to be self-sufficient without any help of others.

trailers.title: 3 Meals A Day Mountain Village | 一日三餐 - 山村篇 1min30sec Highlights 精華片段
